news.paragraph: Meta Platforms is being highlighted as a potentially undervalued tech stock, with recent reports suggesting it could surpass Tesla in market value. The company has also launched a new app reminiscent of Reddit, a move that could drive user engagement and potentially unlock new revenue streams. Analysts are viewing Meta as a 'buy' opportunity, citing its significant upside potential.

headlines.title: Meta Platforms: A Tech Bargain To 'Buy' Now (NASDAQ:META)
